data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a recipient signature for high-value items, as stated in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the implementation of this functionality, such as API reads or persisted state checks demonstrating that a signature capture occurs during the delivery of high-value items. The absence of this evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of recipient signature capture for high-value items.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for signature capture functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide API reads or state checks that confirm the signature capture process for high-value items.
